_notes: Top-level: requestId (required), results (required), searchType (optional), costDollars (optional). results[].score is optional. text/highlights only present when requested via contents param.

results.title: Attention Is All You Need
results.author: Ashish Vaswani et al.
results.text: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks that include an encoder and a decoder. The best performing models also connect the encoder and decoder through an attention mechanism. We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.
highlights: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms
dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely

results.title: Transformers - Hugging Face Documentation
results.text: Transformers provides APIs and tools to easily download and train state-of-the-art pretrained models. Using pretrained models can reduce your compute costs, carbon footprint, and save you the time and resources required to train a model from scratch.
highlights: Transformers provides APIs and tools to easily download and train state-of-the-art pretrained models

results.title: The Illustrated Transformer
results.author: Jay Alammar
results.text: Discussions of AI, Machine Learning, NLP and other related topics. This post is a visual explanation of the Transformer — the model from the paper Attention is All You Need. It helps to understand the model as a black box first.
highlights: This post is a visual explanation of the Transformer
